name: Donna Brazile
subject: Sunday: Rally to save health care in Bowie
body:
Join a rally to save health care near you
---
**Democrats around the country are rallying to save health care on Sunday, January 15th. Say you'll join us in Bowie to fight for affordable care:**

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/HCR-20715?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist")**
Friend --

Earlier this week, President Obama asked us one more time to be the change we've been waiting for.

He reminded us that our democracy needs us -- and not just when there's an election.

He called on us to show up. Dive in. Stay at it. To lace up our shoes and get organized.

And guess what? You have an opportunity right now to do just that. **This weekend, Democrats are holding rallies in cities across America to support the Affordable Care Act. RSVP now for one in Bowie this Sunday, January 15th:**

**Our First Stand Rally With Sen. Chris Van Hollen & Reps. Steny Hoyer, Anthony Brown, John Sarbanes & Jamie Raskin**
**When:** Sunday, January 15th at 2:00 pm EST
**Where:** Bowie Student Center Ballroom, Bowie State University
14000 Jericho Park Road
Bowie, MD 20715

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/HCR-20715?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist")** **[(or click here to locate a rally in another city)](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c002/4067b0a/23271c996/7e787fed/2840317651/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/HCR-list?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+or+click+here+to+locate+a+rally+in+anoth&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist")**
Sunday is a perfect moment for action -- not only as we ready ourselves for the incoming administration, but as we prepare to celebrate the life and memory of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., who reminded us that "of all the forms of inequality, injustice in health care is the most shocking and inhumane."

It's time to make your voice heard to let Republicans in Congress know just what health care means to you and your family, friends, and neighbors. Tens of millions of Americans' lives will be affected if the GOP and Trump administration follow through on their promise to repeal the law that is helping so many and has the potential to help so many more.

**So we're counting on folks like you. Say you'll join Democrats in Bowie on Sunday, January 15th to fight for health care:**

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/HCR-20715?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist")**
Thanks for stepping up,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c002/4067b0a/23271c996/7e787feb/2840317651/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c002/4067b0a/23271c996/7e787fe8/2840317651/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c002/4067b0a/23271c996/7e787fe9/2840317651/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c002/4067b0a/23271c996/7e787ff6/2840317651/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170112_db_dist&source=em_20170112_db_dist"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: SIGN THE PETITION: Don't let "an insult to justice" become our next Attorney General.
body:
There’s not a moment to lose. Tell Your Senator Today: Vote no on Jeff Sessions for Attorney General » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3679&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=Sessions)

URGENT: Confirmation hearings for Jeff Sessions already underway.

Tell Your Senator:

If Alabama Senator Jeff Sessions was too racist to be confirmed as a federal judge in 1986, how can we trust him to now lead the Department of Justice?

SIGN NOW (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3679&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=Sessions) Activist — Jeff Sessions does not believe in climate change. He thinks that extra CO2 in the atmosphere is harmless “plant food.” He has called the Voting Rights Act “a piece of intrusive legislation.” His nomination has been applauded by white supremacists and he was found too racist to be a federal judge in the 1980s.

His opposition to immigration reform as well as his stances on voting rights and hate crime prosecutions make him unfit to safeguard the civil rights of all the different people who make up the fabric of our country.

Trump and Republican leaders in Congress disagree. They think Sessions should oversee the Department of Justice and enforce all our nation’s laws, including environmental regulations like the Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act. We say NO WAY.

The League of Conservation Voters (LCV) is on the front lines of this fight — if we raise our voices together we can have an impact on his confirmation hearing. Just last week, there was such a fierce outcry on Congress's decision to gut the Office of Congressional Ethics that it was dropped almost immediately! We need to raise as big a ruckus for Sessions’ hearing too.

Speak out NOW. Tell your Senator to reject Jeff Sessions for Attorney General » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3679&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=Sessions)

The US Attorney General (AG) oversees the Department of Justice (DOJ), and sets enforcement priorities in terms of what laws to focus on. Sessions has opposed nearly every piece of environmental legislation since 1997, earning him an appalling 7% lifetime score on LCV’s National Environmental Scorecard.

If confirmed, Sessions could imperil civil rights and voting rights protections, and he could to refuse enforce environmental laws or regulations meant to protect everyone in this country. This is not the man to lead the Department of Justice, or to defend the rights of the American people.

Sessions needs 51 votes from the Senate to be confirmed. The public outcry against him so far has been massive. More than 1,000 law professors from across the country have even called on the Senate to reject Sessions for AG. We cannot let up. It is so important to make your voice heard right now. Your Senator could be the key to blocking this nomination.

Sessions is the wrong man for this job: Urge your Senator to dump Sessions » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3679&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=Sessions)

Trump’s campaign showed us, time and again, that he doesn’t care about civil rights, environmental laws, gender equality, our immigrant community, or voting rights. But this nomination shows how serious the Trump administration is about dismantling the civil rights focus of the current DOJ.

We must stand together in this fight.

Sincerely,

Kristin Brown
Director of Digital Strategy
League of Conservation Voters
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTE0LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvNjcyMTE3NzY=

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Tyler Foote
subject: LAST CHANCE: Register for AFP-VA’s Lobby Day and Meet with Rep. Dave Brat, Activist Martha Boneta and More!
body:
---
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | Hi Peter,

Americans for Prosperity-Virginia is hosting a [Lobby Day in Richmond](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3bba1b06743d354b3dd3eec18fab47d02b3c6bb82a27ff9c7aba701c2b4eb4dd19fb1ffcd85e71c) next Monday and I want to make sure you don't miss out.

On **Monday, January 16** , we're bringing more than [250 citizen leaders to the Capitol](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3bba1b06743d354b3dd3eec18fab47d02b3c6bb82a27ff9c7aba701c2b4eb4dd19fb1ffcd85e71c) to call on legislators this session to reduce spending, lower taxes, reform the state's regulatory burden, and provide all Virginia students with more educational choice.

If that's not enticing enough, just look at the speakers we have confirmed to talk at the event with our activists before heading to the Capitol:

* **Tim Phillips** , Americans for Prosperity President
* U.S. Congressman **Dave Brat**
* **Martha Boneta** , Farming Rights Activist
* **Ed Gillespie** , Gubernatorial Candidate
* **Denver Riggleman** , Gubernatorial Candidate
* **Sen. Frank Wagner** , Gubernatorial Candidate
* **Corey Stewart** , Gubernatorial Candidate

Don't let the travel to Richmond keep you from coming, we're providing **free bus transportation** from multiple locations across the state - [just be sure to sign up for the one you need here](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3bba1b06743d354b3dd3eec18fab47d02b3c6bb82a27ff9c7aba701c2b4eb4dd19fb1ffcd85e71c). But don't wait any longer to register - spots are almost gone!

Our [Lobby Day](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3bba1b06743d354b3dd3eec18fab47d02b3c6bb82a27ff9c7aba701c2b4eb4dd19fb1ffcd85e71c) is a great way to learn about the issues AFP-Virginia will be engaging on this year, with the chance to network not only with fellow activists but also key political players in our state.

I hope you'll [register to attend our Lobby Day](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3bba1b06743d354b3dd3eec18fab47d02b3c6bb82a27ff9c7aba701c2b4eb4dd19fb1ffcd85e71c) and help us Build the Path to Prosperity here in Virginia.

I look forward to seeing you Monday.

In Liberty,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

|
|
|

---|---|---
|

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3bba1b06743d3543a56720232180a2f24f26ef4e5bf8c89a9a92f88f177aedc7606ae21d93f549b)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Your day -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want you to celebrate it by carrying this personalized card. | Friend, Inauguration Day is only one week from today. And it will be your day. The day when you get to see all your hard work and sacrifices pay off. The day when the world will witness a free people take their country back. Because this Inauguration Day is all about you and your love for our country, I want you to carry your 2017 Inaugural Membership card – embossed in your name – and pledge your commitment for the new year. Please activate your Inaugural Membership and make a contribution of $200, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to help us lay the groundwork to sustain our winning movement.
Your support during the election helped us do something never before seen in American politics. Despite being outspent 2 to 1 by our opponent, despite extreme opposition from lobbyists and the establishment, and despite an onslaught of lies and attacks from the dishonest media, we won – and we won BIG. We won thanks to you, Friend. But we can’t stop fighting now. We have to keep working on sustaining everything we fought so hard to achieve. I want to see our country win again in two years and in four years – and beyond. Those same groups that tried to stop us last year have not gone away. They will spend the next four years trying to tear us apart. But it’s not going to happen, because I’ll have you by my side. With your support, we’ll continue making smart investments to get our message – and the truth – straight to the voter. With just ONE WEEK LEFT until inauguration, please make an early investment today of $200, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to activate your Inaugural Membership for the 2017 year. Thank you, Donald J. Trump ACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP Please activate your Inaugural Membership and make a contribution of $200, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to help us lay the groundwork to sustain our winning movement. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba31wQG2GbCHwWgaBE2mDRMN6aaaaCJ-yBMHR-Esa?p=6@yA35z&j=Yurngqdx1A_brVng.hjr&g=i&s=&w=v6w8wA5ymzhu5nifplpwVq5rZrWDXfmi5wzDYooDekXDoDoDck5j56&oDo With just ONE WEEK LEFT until inauguration, please make an early investment today of $200, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to activate your Inaugural Membership for the 2017 year. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba31wQG2GbCHwWgaBE2mDRMN6aaaaCJ-yBMHR-Esa?p=6@yA35z&j=Yurngqdx1A_brVng.hjr&g=h&s=&w=v6w8wA5ymzhu5nifplpwVq5rZrWDXfmi5wzDYooDekXDoDoDck5j56&oDo ACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP ---------------------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba31wQG2GbCHwWgaBE2mDRMN6aaaaCJ-yBMHR-Esa?p=6@yA35z&j=Yurngqdx1A_brVng.hjr&g=g&s=&w=v6w8wA5ymzhu5nifplpwVq5rZrWDXfmi5wzDYooDekXDoDoDck5j56&oDo Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email Unsubscribe ----------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/edfba31wQG2GbCHwWgaBE2mDRMN6aaaaCJ-yBMHR-Esa?p=6@yA35z&j=Yurngqdx1A_brVng.hjr&g=j&s= email ----- mailto:unsubscribe@gop.com?Subject=Unsubscribe%20

name: Democrats.org
subject: Donald thinks he can get away with anything. Show him he’s wrong →
body:
A step-by-step gude to bribe the next president
---
**It's up to us to prevent the most corrupt, conflict-ridden administration in history. Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats hold Trump accountable.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c01c/4067b0a/2321dfb73/7e787ee7/2055835667/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170113_ew_nd&source=em_20170113_ew_nd")**
Friend --

On Wednesday, Donald Trump was supposed to reveal his long-awaited plan to separate his personal business interests from his new job as president.

Instead, we got a step-by-step guide for anyone in the world to bribe the next President of the United States.

Trump won't release his tax returns so the public can see if he has conflicts of interest, won't divest from his businesses, won't pledge not to discuss business with his sons once they take over day-to-day operations of the company -- and even if Trump were willing to adhere to the most basic ethical standards, there's no independent mechanism for transparency or accountability.

**[So it's going to be on Democrats to hold Trump's feet to the fire from the second he takes office -- to prevent the most corrupt, conflict-ridden administration in American history.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c01c/4067b0a/2321dfb73/7e787ee4/2055835667/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+So+its+going+to+be+on+Democrats+to+hold+&utm_campaign=em_20170113_ew_nd&source=em_20170113_ew_nd")**

We've always relied on grassroots supporters like you to stand with us for big fights like these, and we're going to need you in the trenches with us for the next four years of the Trump administration. Can you pitch in $3 or more right now?

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c01c/4067b0a/2321dfb73/7e787ee5/2055835667/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170113_ew_nd&source=em_20170113_ew_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c01c/4067b0a/2321dfb73/7e787ee2/2055835667/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170113_ew_nd&source=em_20170113_ew_nd")**

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c01c/4067b0a/2321dfb73/7e787eec/2055835667/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170113_ew_nd&source=em_20170113_ew_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c01c/4067b0a/2321dfb73/7e787eea/2055835667/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170113_ew_nd&source=em_20170113_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.
clean_body: A step-by-step gude to bribe the next president It's up to us to prevent the most corrupt, conflict-ridden administration in history. Pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats hold Trump accountable. "" Friend -- On Wednesday, Donald Trump was supposed to reveal his long-awaited plan to separate his personal business interests from his new job as president. Instead, we got a step-by-step guide for anyone in the world to bribe the next President of the United States. Trump won't release his tax returns so the public can see if he has conflicts of interest, won't divest from his businesses, won't pledge not to discuss business with his sons once they take over day-to-day operations of the company -- and even if Trump were willing to adhere to the most basic ethical standards, there's no independent mechanism for transparency or accountability. "" We've always relied on grassroots supporters like you to stand with us for big fights like these, and we're going to need you in the trenches with us for the next four years of the Trump administration. Can you pitch in $3 or more right now? If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" Or donate another amount: "" Thanks, Eric Eric Walker Deputy Communications Director Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Denise Feriozzi, EMILY's List
subject: Details for the Women's March on Washington >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7084/24c69fd9/fdb86903/18eeb790/2405815479/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails&source=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails")
---

Peter,

The Women's March on Washington is fast approaching, and we hope to see you there!

If you want to show your EMILY's List pride, then come grab some rally signs and march with us. We will be meeting up here:
**Location:** The Spirit of Justice Park, located at New Jersey Ave. and D St. SE **([map](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7084/24c69fd9/fdb86903/18eeb791/2405815479/VEsE/ "https://www.google.com/maps/place/The+Spirit+of+Justice+Park,+Washington,+DC+20016/@38.8855577,-77.0101919,18z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x89b7b82a60d121b5:0x31bd98908693f3b4!8m2!3d38.8856106!4d-77.0093052?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+map&utm_campaign=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails&source=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails"))**
**Time:** On Saturday January 21st, we will meet at the park at 8:30 a.m. and depart as a group for the march promptly at 9:30 a.m.
If you see people wearing yellow EMILY's List hats or holding EMILY's List signs, you're probably in the right place.

We are so looking forward to marching with you and showing the world that women won't back down.

See you there!

Thank you,

Denise Feriozzi
Deputy Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7084/24c69fd9/fdb86903/18eeb792/2405815479/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails&source=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7084/24c69fd9/fdb86903/18eeb793/2405815479/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails&source=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7084/24c69fd9/fdb86903/18eeb78c/2405815479/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails&source=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7084/24c69fd9/fdb86903/18eeb78d/2405815479/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails&source=WQENE113_digital_email_20170113_Marchdetails"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Will you be watching on Sunday?
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
At 1:00 a.m. yesterday, Senate Republicans took a vote that got them one step closer to gutting the Affordable Care Act. They voted to end coverage for preexisting conditions, veterans benefits, and aid to rural hospitals.
This is outrageous -- and we're fighting back. On Sunday, people all over the country will be gathering to stand up in defense of healthcare.
**Our Revolution is livestreaming Senator Sanders' event** so those that do not have a gathering near them can participate. In order to protect the significant positive steps that the Affordable Care Act accomplished in the path towards universal healthcare, we all must come together and fight.
**[Will you tune in to watch Bernie's rally LIVE on Sunday at 1:00 p.m. ET? Click here to RSVP.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full")**
Thanks for standing with us in the fight against these Republican attacks.
In solidarity,
The team at Our Revolution
* * *

[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full")

Sisters and Brothers -
Republicans in Congress have made it a top priority to repeal the Affordable Care Act, defund Planned Parenthood and make huge cuts to Medicaid and Medicare, putting 30 million Americans at risk of losing their health care.
We need to show them that they are not going to get away with it.
**That's why this Sunday, January 15, Our Revolution is hosting a livestream featuring Bernie's rally that's part of a national day of action called "Our First Stand: Save Health Care."**
[**Will you tune in to watch Bernie's speech on Sunday?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full")
**[YES, I'LL TUNE IN»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170113-full")**
There will be dozens of events across the country where people will come together to tell Republicans that they cannot take away health care from tens of millions of Americans.
We hope you'll join us by tuning in to the livestream to watch Bernie's speech and help fight back against Republican attacks on health care.
In solidarity,
The team at Our Revolution
** **

** **
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

subject: Collectible Inauguration Coins are here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your Commemorative Inauguration Coin today. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba32nBAHFRtCHxWgaBFMuDRMN6aaaaCKZhBMHSVNaa?p=7@yBxCx&j=Yurngqdx1A_brVng.hjr&g=l&s=&w=v6w8wA5hjrhjhtmfonqj5nifplpwVq5hjniDnua35oah5y5y5maDZDw&y5y)

Friend,

You can forever hold a piece history with the just-released Official Commemorative Inauguration Coin.

# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
